side_effects.description: Weight stalled and skin tingle went away with a bad/underdosed 20mg vial for about 1 month; appetite suppression and skin tingles returned with new vial

protocol_notes: Had an experience with an underdosed vial of Reta (20mg vial from same vendor/batch). Weight stalled for 1 month, skin tingle and appetite suppression disappeared. Resolved when starting the next vial. Advises 12-week cuts and taking a maintenance break before restarting.
